Fashion Blog: Stefani's L.A.M.B.
Can't Fashion Week?
Don't worry,
covered!
We'll hitting shows reporting right here, every runway!
afternoon caught eyeful Stefani's L.A.M.B.
show.
Stefani Zuma.
FASHION: Edgy, rocker chic, high-heel booty shoes, straps, ripped shirts, over-the-knee socks, muti-fabric tight pants, military inspired cargo pants, layered, colors.
Leather jackets, metallic jackets, plaid, British inspired asymmetrical jackets separate corset, futuristic leather dresses, ruched black catsuit, trench coats.
BEAUTY: Bangs curled 1940's inspired hair, maroon lipstick, smokey eyes, almost Teese-esque.
dramatic.
Styling Paula Bradley, makeup Charlotte Tilbury M.A.C.
Team, Danilo Group.
